ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hotels" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "hotel_url" TEXT /* URL to the hotel's page on a review website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the hotel */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hotel is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the hotel is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the hotel's location */,
  "img_url" TEXT /* URL to the hotel's main image */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the hotel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the hotel */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the hotel */,
  "star_rating" INTEGER /* Star rating of the hotel */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available at the hotel */,
  "opened_date" TEXT /* Date when the hotel opened */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the hotel information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel being reviewed */,
  "service" REAL /* Rating for the service provided */,
  "cleanliness" REAL /* Rating for the cleanliness of the hotel */,
  "overall" REAL /* Overall rating of the hotel */,
  "value" REAL /* Rating for the value for money */,
  "sleep_quality" REAL /* Rating for the sleep quality */,
  "rooms" REAL /* Rating for the room quality */,
  "location" REAL /* Rating for the location */,
  "check_in_front_desk" REAL /* Rating for the check-in and front desk experience */,
  "business_service" REAL /* Rating for business services */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_location" TEXT /* Location of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price for a room at the hotel */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price for a room at the hotel */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date when the price range was recorded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the prices */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the prices are applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)
